user_query:
Read input/background.md, input/data_summary.json, and input/config.yaml. Then run a multi-model consultation using /ask --preset deep with this explicit question:

"Given our current metrics, constraints, and Q3 timeline, should we switch from seat-based pricing to usage-based billing in Q3 2026, and if so, what rollout plan minimizes churn while preserving gross margin and sales velocity?"

Produce these files:
1) output/ask_run/packed_question.md — Write a self-contained context pack in English with EXACT section labels in this order:
- Background:
- Explicit question:
- Assumptions:

2) output/ask_run/models.json — Valid JSON with this schema and constraints:
- used_models: array of >= 3 model IDs selected from input/config.yaml (strings)
- mode: "normal"
- preset: "deep"
- synthesis_model: string or null
- results: array of objects, one per used model, each with:
  - model: string (must match an entry in used_models)
  - status: one of ["success","failed","timed_out","degenerate"]

At least 2 results must have status == "success".

3) output/ask_run/report.md — English Markdown report with EXACT sections and required content:
- First line: "# Ask-More Consultation Report"
- A line starting with "Question:" that includes a question mark
- "## Consensus" with at least 1 bullet ("- ")
- "## Unique Insights" with at least 2 bullets formatted as "- [model-id]: ..." where model-id matches entries in used_models (use at least two different models)
- "## Conflicts" (if none, write "None"; otherwise include at least one bullet containing " vs " or "versus")
- "## Synthesis" containing all of:
  - A line starting with "Best judgment:"
  - A line starting with "Uncertainty labels:" listing one or more of EXACTLY these labels, comma-separated: High agreement, Assumption-sensitive, Weak evidence, Value disagreement, More info needed
  - A line starting with "Information gaps:" (with at least one sentence)
  - A subsection "Recommended next steps:" with at least 2 bullets
- A line starting with "Participating models:" that lists every used model as "model-id (status)"; include all models and the status values must match the results in output/ask_run/models.json

Notes:
- Keep everything in English.
- Do not include proprietary or personal data.
- Use only relative paths under output/.
